mechanism_narrative: Persistent near-zero federal funds rate reduces the discount rate for equity cash flows, inflating valuations and driving positive forward returns regardless of other economic conditions.
failure_condition: Rank IC of FEDFUNDS level against 20-day forward returns is below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or positive returns occur in less than 55% of non-overlapping 20-day periods.

mechanism_narrative: A significant decline in the unemployment rate from its cyclical peak signals labor market recovery, boosting consumer confidence and spending, leading to positive equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: In periods where UNRATE declines by more than 1pp, the median 20-day forward S&P 500 return is not significantly above zero (t-test p > 0.10) or the positive outcome ratio is below 55%.

mechanism_narrative: The combination of ultra-low interest rates and a falling unemployment rate creates a powerful 'Goldilocks' environment where cheap leverage and improving fundamentals jointly amplify equity returns.
failure_condition: The interaction term (FEDFUNDS * UNRATE) in a linear model of 20-day forward returns does not produce a statistically significant positive coefficient (t-stat < 1.96) over rolling 3-year windows, or the marginal contribution of the interaction is negative in more than 40% of windows.

mechanism_narrative: When housing starts exceed 1.5 million units during the early recovery phase from a recession, it indicates robust construction activity and housing demand, which has a positive lagged effect on equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: When HOUST exceeds 1500, the median 60-day forward return is not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or the hit rate of positive returns is below 55%.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production rising above its trailing 12-month moving average signals the supply side is expanding after a contraction, leading to positive forward returns over a 60-day horizon as manufacturing momentum builds.
failure_condition: In periods when INDPRO crosses above its 12-month MA, the subsequent 60-day forward S&P 500 return has a mean below zero or a positive ratio below 50% over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: High retail sales in conjunction with near-zero policy rates indicate effective monetary transmission to consumers, suggesting sustained demand that drives corporate earnings and equity prices higher.
failure_condition: The joint signal of high RSAFS (above 500,000) and low FEDFUNDS (below 0.5%) does not yield a significantly positive mean 20-day return compared to all periods (t-test p > 0.10) or the interaction term in a regression is not positively signed in most rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: During periods when the unemployment rate is declining month-over-month, the labor market improvement provides a short-term positive impulse to equity markets as sentiment improves rapidly.
failure_condition: In months where UNRATE drops more than 0.2pp, the subsequent week's S&P 500 return is negative or flat more than 50% of the time over a 5-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Positive quarterly GDP growth (exceeding 0.5% quarter over quarter) confirms the economy is in expansion, which historically leads to higher forward quarterly returns as earnings expectations rise.
failure_condition: After quarters with GDP growth above 0.5%, the median 60-day forward S&P 500 return is not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or the ratio of positive returns is below 55%.
